steps.title: Track the passage focus
steps.content: The text centers on Davis and Evans's 1958 adaptation of Gershwin's Porgy and Bess. It explains that their version did not duplicate the original: they omitted parts and only briefly gestured toward some melodies.

steps.title: Choose the purpose
steps.content: A is too broad because the passage is not a full history of their collaboration. C makes an unsupported claim about critics, and D says the text ranks one artwork above another. The passage describes how two artists changed another artist's work. The answer is B.
